name: Swashbuckling Isles
description: Preset Swashbuckling Isles with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: Rival captains race to claim a map to a legendary vault.
text_areas.setting: Storm-torn archipelagos, free ports, and imperial patrol routes.
text_areas.main_objective: Gather map fragments before the imperial armada does.
text_areas.stakes: Empire secures absolute naval dominance and crushes free ports.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
